contentBody.headMarkup:
<title>Welcome to LWC Communities!</title>
<style>
    .govuk-header__link {
        color: white !important;
    }
          
    .community_byo-scoped-header-and-footer__header-content {
    	background-color: transparent !important;
        padding: 0 !important; /* Optional: remove extra space */
        margin: 0 !important;
    }
    
    .community_byo-scoped-header-and-footer__footer-content {
    	background-color: transparent !important;
        padding: 0 !important; /* Optional: remove extra space */
        margin: 0 !important;
    }
    
    .govuk-footer__copyright-logo {
        color: black !important;
    }
    
    .component-wrapper-spacer {
        margin-bottom: 0 !important;
    }
    
    .comm-section-container {
        padding-top: 0 !important;
        padding-bottom: 0 !important;
    }
    
    /* Remove margin/padding from the outer wrapper divs of the summary list */
    .summary-list-container .slds-card,
    .summary-list-container .c-gov-summary-list {
        margin-bottom: 0;
        padding-bottom: 0;
    }

    /* Optional: add a controlled spacing between the summary lists */
    .summary-list-container .slds-card + .slds-card,
    .summary-list-container .c-gov-summary-list + .c-gov-summary-list {
        margin-top: 1rem; /* adjust spacing between components */
    }

    .govuk-header__logo {
        width: unset !important;
        padding-right: 2rem !important;
    }

    .govuk-header__content {
        width: unset !important;
    }
    
    .govuk-header__link--service-name {
    	margin-top: 0.2rem !important;    
    }
    
    html {
        background: #fff !important;
    }
    
    .govuk-link {
        text-decoration: underline !important;
  		text-decoration-thickness: max(1px, .0625rem) !important;
  		text-underline-offset: .1578em !important;
    }
    .govuk-link:hover {
        text-decoration-thickness: max(3px, .1875rem, .12em) !important;
    }
    
    a.skip-to-main {
      	color: #ffffff !important;
      	text-decoration: underline;
        font-size: 1.25rem;
  		font-weight: bold;
      	line-height: 1.3;
    }

    a.skip-to-main:focus,
    a.skip-to-main:active,
    a.skip-to-main:hover {
      	color: #ffffff !important;
      	text-decoration: underline;
    }
    
</style>

<!-- branding stylesheets -->

<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/salesforce-lightning-design-system.min.css?{ versionKey }"/>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/dxp-site-spacing-styling-hooks.min.css?{ versionKey }" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/dxp-styling-hooks.min.css?{ versionKey }" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ basePath }/assets/styles/dxp-slds-extensions.min.css?{ versionKey }" />



<!-- branding stylesheets-->

<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ styles/styles.css }" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{ styles/print.css }" media="print"/>
